title: edk2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.

- Replace upstream references [Orabug:36569119]

- edk2-update-dbx-to-20250610.patch [RHEL-96869]

[20241117-3]
- edk2-OvmfPkg-Use-the-OvmfPkg-version-of-CcProbeLib.patch [RHEL-70865]

full_text:
[20241117-4.0.1]
- Replace upstream references [Orabug:36569119]

[20241117-4]
- edk2-update-dbx-to-20250610.patch [RHEL-96869]
- Resolves: RHEL-96869
  ([edk2,rhel-9] dbx update 20250610)

[20241117-3]
